data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram utilizes a microservices architecture to enhance modularity and scalability.

data.title: Graph Database Utilization
data.description: Meta, Instagram's parent company, leverages graph databases for efficient relationship mapping.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: A CDN is used to distribute content globally, reducing latency for users.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Load balancers distribute network or application traffic across multiple servers.

data.title: Data Center Infrastructure
data.description: Robust data center infrastructure ensures reliability and uptime.
